src/utils.ts
<<<<<<< SEARCH
// Example with nested <<<<<<< markers in comments
function process(data) {
  if (data.type === 'search') {
    return data.query;
  }
  // Note: <<<<<<< SEARCH in code should not split
  // And >>>>>>> REPLACE in comments either
  return null;
}
=======
// Updated version
function process(data) {
  if (data.type === 'query') {
    return data.search;
  }
  // Nested markers in comments
  // <<<<<<< SEARCH
  // >>>>>>> REPLACE
  return data;
}
>>>>>>> REPLACE
